title: PAK-NZE-Julia: Open-Source Julia-JuMP Replication of the GIZ-EPRC PAK-IEM 2.0 Model with Climate Feedback and Provincial Disaggregation
description: PAK-NZE-Julia is an independent open-source replication of the official PAK-IEM 2.0 model published by the Energy Planning and Resource Centre (EPRC), Government of Pakistan, with technical support from Deutsche Gesellschaft fur Internationale Zusammenarbeit (GIZ) in February 2026. This Julia-JuMP implementation extends the framework with climate feedback, provincial disaggregation, and a full open-source release with reproducibility notebook support. The software is not affiliated with EPRC, GIZ, or BMZ.
